title: Standardized Immunohistochemical Staining for Human Protein Atlas
author: Anna Martinez Casals
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yj8furw

steps.instruction: Dry paraffin sections at room temperature overnight.
Bake the paraffin sections from 12:00:00 to 24:00:00 at 50 °C .
Xylene incubation: incubate slides in xylene for 00:05:00 . incubate slides in xylene for 00:05:00 . incubate slides in xylene for 00:01:00 .
96% ethanol incubation & 30%H2O2 (1:100): incubate slides for 00:05:00 .
Heat the slides immersed in retrieval buffer for 00:04:00 at 125 °C in a pressure boiler (Decloaking chamber model DC2008INTL).
After completed boiling, leave the slides in the pressure boiler and let them cool down till 90 °C . Total time 00:45:00

Place slides in the Autostainer 480, all the incubations are done at room temperature. Autostainer 480 (ThermoFisher Scientific, cat# A80500007, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/A80500008 )
Rinse slides in wash buffer.
Incubate slides with Ultra V Block for 00:05:00 .
Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #14 .
Incubate slides with primary antibody, diluted in antibody Diluent OP, for 00:30:00 .
Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #16 .
Incubate slides with labeled HRP polymer for 00:30:00 .
Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #18 .
Incubate slides with DAB solution for 00:05:00 .
Rinse slides in distilled water.

Transfer slides in the Autostainer XL. Autostainer XL (Leica biosystems, cat# Leica ST5010 Autostainer XL, https://www.leicabiosystems.com/histology-equipment/he-stainers-special-stainers-coverslippers/products/leica-st5010/ )
Counterstain slides with hematoxylin for 00:07:50 .
Rinse slides in lithium carbonate water diluted 1:5 from saturated solution for 00:01:00 .
Rinse slides in tap water for 00:05:00 .
80% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 80% ethanol for 00:03:00 .
Mount coverslip in each of the slide using Pertex as a mounting media.
Ethanol absolute incubation: incubate slides in ethanol absolute for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in ethanol absolute for 00:03:00 .
96% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 96% ethanol incubation for 03:00:00 .
80% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 80% ethanol incubation for 00:03:00 .
Distilled water: : incubate slides in distilled water or until antigen retrieval step.
96% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 96% ethanol for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in 96% ethanol for 00:03:00 .
99% ethanol incubation: incubate slides in 99% ethanol for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in 99% ethanol for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in 99% ethanol for 00:03:00 .
NeoClear incubation: incubate slides in NeoClear for 00:03:00 . incubate slides in NeoClear for 00:03:00 .
